CELEBRITY REVIEWS CLINIC GALLERY Home Treatments Expertise About The Team Fees Reviews Gallery Clinics Contact Contact contact@dazzle.dental +91 22 41 498949 Book Online Close 1 Bespoke Dental Clinic Comprehensive Care Dazzle was built for patients who expect more — from their time, from their comfort, and from a practice that treats their overall health with the same seriousness they do. Trusted by people who cannot afford to compromise. We built Dazzle around a simple belief — that exceptional clinical outcomes and an experience worth looking forward to are not in conflict. Patients who come once tend not to go anywhere else. Widely regarded as one of the best dental clinics in India, Dazzle Dental Clinic boasts a fully equipped in-house laboratory, underscoring its commitment to cutting-edge technology and digital advancements in healthcare. By leveraging robotic surgeries, lasers, digital occlusion devices, the clinic not only enhances operational efficiency but also upholds the highest standards of clinical dentistry. This approach enables the clinic to meticulously plan and execute 100% digital treatment protocols, delivering exceptional clinical results that promote overall well-being and long-term dental health. Most people leave Dazzle saying it didn't feel like a clinic at all. That's not an accident, it's the standard every consultation, every treatment plan, and every follow-up is held to.  Located in the heart of Mumbai and Delhi, the clinics are the ideal destination for anyone seeking world-class dental care in a comfortable, stress-free environment. Patients travel from across the world to Dazzle Dental for treatment that combines the precision of a specialist, the artistry of a cosmetic studio, and the warmth of a practice that treats you as a person, not a procedure. celebrity dentists @ dazzle Clinics Advanced TREATMENTS, Trusted Globally Some dental problems are straightforward. Many are not. Complex cases, full-mouth rehabilitation, implants, advanced cosmetic work — require specialists who don't work in silos. At Dazzle, 15 senior specialists across seven disciplines review, plan, and treat together. The implantologist and the cosmetic dentist are in the same room before a single procedure begins. The result is a treatment plan built around your whole mouth, and your whole life, not just the problem that brought you in.Over 25 years , this approach has earned the trust of patients who travel specifically for care they cannot find closer to home. Today, that includes patients from more than 20 countries — and over 10,000 who have experienced it firsthand. Join our family of satisfied patients and experience the unparalleled care that sets us apart. Restore Your Full Mouth Today Know More 2 BEST DENTAL CLINIC IN MUMBAI​ Digital dentistry, Oral Rehabilitation & Aesthetics Most dental clinics treat what they can see. We built Dazzle to treat what matters.That distinction begins before your first appointment, with a fully digital diagnostic workflow that maps your oral health with a precision no conventional examination can match. Intraoral scanners. CBCT imaging. Microscope-assisted diagnosis. Every tool chosen because it tells us something a standard X-ray cannot, and because it means your treatment plan is built on data rather than approximation.It extends into how we restore. Our in-house CAD/CAM laboratory , one of very few in private practice, designs and mills restorations, implant components, and prosthetics on-site, to tolerances measured in microns. What this means for you in practice: fewer visits, faster turnaround, and outcomes that fit as they should from the first placement. And it shapes how we approach aesthetics. Cosmetic dentistry at Dazzle is not about changing how you look. It is about returning your teeth to what they should have always been , proportionate, functional, and entirely yours. Smile makeovers, veneers, and full-mouth rehabilitation are planned in the same room, by the same team, with the same standard applied whether the work is visible or not.This is what we mean when we say comprehensive care . Not a list of services. A single standard, applied to everything. Memberships, Certificates and Recognition In the commitment to providing the best to our patients, Dazzle Dental Clinic continuously strives to maintain and deliver above and beyond your expectations. As one of the premier dental clinic in Mumbai, Dazzle offers high-quality standard of care, patient safety and experience.
